message.content:
@startuml
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  BorderColor #666666
  FontColor #000000
}

skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ActorFontColor #000000
}

participant "PlannerNode" as PlannerNode

note left of PlannerNode
  1 cb_trajectory(msg: Trajectory)
end note

note right of PlannerNode
  2 on_update_trajectory
end note

activate PlannerNode
PlannerNode -> PlannerNode : on_update_trajectory
deactivate PlannerNode

@enduml
